title: This Month in GLAM: June 2026
content:
• From the team: Tools, tech, and Wikimania
  • Argentina report: New digitization partner
  • Bangladesh report: International Museum Day Edit-a-thon and Workshop held in Dinajpur, Bangladesh
  • Belgium report: Postal Mission on Wikimedia
  • Brazil report: Empowering Institutions through Wikisource Education and GLAM Capacity Building
  • Czech Republic report: Bridging the gap between labs and Wikipedia: continuing cooperation with FZU
  • Egypt report: From Museum Celebrations to Archival Documentation
  • Finland report: Northern Wikimedist meetup in Oulu
  • France report: #1lib1ref Recap and International Archives Week
  • Italy report: Heritage and Community Action
  • Mexico report: Open GLAM in Puebla
  • Netherlands report: Interview with Olaf Janssen, Wikimedia coordinator of the KB, National library of the Netherlands
  • New Zealand report: BAU at Auckland Museum, Otago Uni Library Life and the NZBSI WiR is complete
  • North Macedonia report: Collaboration with the Botanical garden at the Faculty of Natural Sciences and Mathematics in Skopje
  • Poland report: Poland Report: New Partnerships, Conferences, and Wikimedians in Residence
snippet:
